title: Komandan project config
description: Configuration file for a Komandan project. Loaded by Komandan at project startup from `komandan.json`. Top-level unknown keys (including `$schema`) are ignored by the loader.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI enabling editor validation. Ignored by Komandan at runtime.

version.description: Project version. Free-form string; semver recommended.

main.description: Project-relative path to the entrypoint Lua script executed by Komandan.

defaults.description: Optional project defaults. Omitted fields fall back to Komandan's built-in defaults.

hosts.description: Project-relative path to the hosts definition Lua file.

additionalProperties.description: Arbitrary string-valued default consumed by Komandan modules.
